name: HMS Sarabande (T 125)
events: 13 Mar 1943 HMS P 615 (Lt. C.W.St.C. Lambert, DSC and Bar, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Freetown with HMS Sarabande (A/Skr.Lt. A.S.H. Robb, RD, RNR) and HMS Rumba (T/Lt. E.C.F.D. Jacquier, RNVR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
